title: Viewer tighter gaps + fit-to-width fix
description:
PDF Viewer inter-page grey spacing is reduced (~80%: default 8px → 2px, legacy stored 8px migrates to 2px). Fit-to-width now measures the scroll column width (not full host width including the plan library sidebar), which was causing ~35% horizontal clipping.

Hard-refresh PipeSync (dbg70). Open PDF Viewer, confirm sheets fit edge-to-edge and gaps between pages are minimal.
changeLog: Default page gap 8px → 2px; legacy 8px pref migrates to 2px.
Fit avail width prefers scroll.clientWidth over host.clientWidth.
Fit content width uses media footprint (natW − crops).
Debug ingest logs for avail/zoom/gap (session d9d6c9).
